latHint: Think guiding a path - not medical records.
pivHint: A CHART tracks a patient's vitals - but you can also CHART a course. What word means to guide a direction?
winText: Setting the direction. CHART was the pivot - medical record to STEER a course.
lossText: STEER - to guide or direct. CHART was the pivot: patient CHART to STEER a course.
